properties.remark: A VESSEL REPORTED A WATERSPOUT ABOUT 3 MILES SOUTH OF KEY WEST, EXTENDING ONE-THIRD OF THE WAY DOWN FROM THE CLOUD BASE WITH NO SPRAY RING VISIBLE. PRIOR TO THE CALL, TWO WATERSPOUTS WERE VISIBLE, BUT ONE HAD DISSIPATED. THE REMAINING WATERSPOUT BEGAN TO DECAY SHORTLY AFTER THE CALL WAS TAKEN.
